text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Grass, I won! I won! Did you see me?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Are you okay?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Yes. And I did see you win from the endless darkness of that black
hole.

text_block_list.name: Mercenary Machos
text_block_list.text: You play it cool, but you're tough as nails, Grass.

text_block_list.name: Horsegirl Lord Golshi
text_block_list.text:
Haaa ha ha ha! If you think this game is over, then you're sorely
mistaken!

text_block_list.name: Horsegirl Lord Golshi
text_block_list.text: Don't you know? Every RPG worth its salt has an even harder EX boss!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Enough with the bravado, Golshi.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
There are only three Umamusume in this world. How could there be
another opponent stronger than you?

text_block_list.name: Horsegirl Lord Golshi
text_block_list.text: There is one such opponent, and it's standing right in front of you! Can't you see it?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Nope! This place sure is desolate... There's nothing here but you and
your castle!

text_block_list.name: Horsegirl Lord Golshi
text_block_list.text: Aha, so you do see it after all. Behold the true last boss!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Are you saying the final boss is...

text_block_list.name: Horsegirl Lord Golshi
text_block_list.text:
That's right! The Horsegirl Lord's keep is no ordinary castle. I've been
feeding it extra-rich carrot extract to boost its energy!

text_block_list.name: Horsegirl Lord Golshi
text_block_list.text: Rise up, Golshi Castle! Show us your fourth form!

text_block_list.name: Golshi Castle
text_block_list.text: Mnrrrgh! Gooolshiii!

text_block_list.name: Horsegirl Lord Golshi
text_block_list.text: Mwahahaha! So, what do you say to this? Can your fists beat this one down? I'll believe it when I see it! Kekekeke! Naaanana, naaana!

text_block_list.name: Horsegirl Lord Golshi
text_block_list.text:
Go on, Golshi Castle. Hurry up and smash them to smithereens!
Unfortunately for you, this game you're playing is impossible to beat!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Grass, I don't think my brawler skills will stand a chance against this
one!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
My Angelic Bolt won't do much to a fortress either. What should we
do?

text_block_list.name: Mercenary Machos
text_block_list.text: Girls! Can't your Umamusume powers somehow do the trick?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Our Umamusume powers... We could try. If we can't rely on our class
powers, then we have no other...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Wait! Now that you mention it...

text_block_list.name: Mystic Granny
text_block_list.text:
"Fantasy incarnate shall look down upon this world from the heavens.
With innate, thunderous power, she will deliver unto the demon lord a
strike of destruction and felicity alike."

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
"Innate, thunderous power". If we interpret that as an ability that
Umamusume acquire naturally...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Look down upon this world... deliver thunderous destruction... unto
the demon lord...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I know! I've got it! I think we can beat this castle!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: You figured it out, Grass?! What are we supposed to do?!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Machos. Could you give me any of those Growth Potions you used?
The kind that turned you into a giant.

text_block_list.name: Mercenary Machos
text_block_list.text: Huh? Uh, sure. One of these, right?!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: More, please! I need everything you've got!

text_block_list.name: Mercenary Machos
text_block_list.text: Everything? If you drink that much, you'll be spewin' blood out your nose on a one-way trip to Heavenheim...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
If I was a human, perhaps, but it's nothing an Umamusume can't
stomach! Now hurry!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Whooooaa, Grass?!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Nice view from up here. ♪ Gigantic Umamusume, coming
through.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Ummm... I might've grown too much. I can't even see Golshi Castle anymore.

text_block_list.name: Horsegirl Lord Golshi
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you big oaf! Cut it out! Stay away from me! Look where you're
walking!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I'm sure it was somewhere over here...

text_block_list.name: Golshi Castle
text_block_list.text: Mnrrrgh?! Gooolshiii!

text_block_list.name: Horsegirl Lord Golshi
text_block_list.text: Noooooo! My 1:1 scale HG Golshi Castle!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Oh no... Did I do that? I'm sorry, I didn't see it there.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: You sure stomped it straight-on for someone who "didn't see it".

text_block_list.name: Mystic Granny
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, a thunderous strike from above! It's just as the legend
predicted.

text_block_list.name: Mystic Granny
text_block_list.text:
But, wait. The legend said that both destruction and felicity would be
delivered unto the demon lord.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Qué? I get the destruction bit, but felicity?

text_block_list.name: Horsegirl Lord Golshi
text_block_list.text:
Quit screwing around. You think this is some kinda game?! Well, I'll
show you...

text_block_list.name: Horsegirl Lord Golshi
text_block_list.text: Hey, muscle guy! Fork over the rest of those giant potions!

text_block_list.name: Mercenary Machos
text_block_list.text: Hey! Whaddya you think you're doin'?

text_block_list.name: Horsegirl Lord Golshi
text_block_list.text:
I'm not giving up yet! Here comes Giant Golshi, fresh from the land of
light!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Huh? You're turning into a giant, too?

text_block_list.name: Horsegirl Lord Golshi
text_block_list.text:
You bet! I'm not letting this chance slip away! Now, come here! Let's
gooooo!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: W-wait, I didn't—why did she fall?

text_block_list.name: Horsegirl Lord Golshi
text_block_list.text: I didn't fall! I'm lying down. With that leg power of yours, I bet you could really help me out.

text_block_list.name: Horsegirl Lord Golshi
text_block_list.text:
Now, I need you to step on me. Right here, around my shoulders.
Your lightning did jack for my cramps, but a good strong massage
might help.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Ah, oh. How is this, then?

text_block_list.name: Horsegirl Lord Golshi
text_block_list.text:
Ahhhh... That's the spot. Yeah, just like that... Give it a good stomp...
harder... Ooh!

text_block_list.name: Mystic Granny
text_block_list.text: Oh... Destruction and felicity! We've been saved! Our world has been saved!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Go figure... I guess it makes sense a cleric could heal stiff shoulders
too...
